title: goodenia lyrata
intro: Goodenia lyrata, also known as the parrot's beak or parrot's feather, is a flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Goodenia lyrata include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary problems. Herbal preparations of Goodenia lyrata can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
